ingredients_text: white chocolate flavour coating (92%) [sugar, cocoa butter, skimmed milk powder, corn syrup solids, lactose (milk), vegetable oil (palm, and/or shea, and/or sunflower oil), milk fat, emulsifiers (soya lecithin (e322), polyglycerol polyricinoleate (e476) from castor bean oil),  artificial flavour (vanillin)], coloured sugar candy sprinkles (8%) [sugar, corn starch, glazing agents (carnuba wax (e903), beeswax (e901)),  natural colours (beetroot red, curcumin), spirulina extracts (source of natural colour),glucose, vegetable oils (palm and shea oil)],
